intro: Polygala hasskarlii, also known as Chinese senega, is a plant species within the family Polygalaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine for its therapeutic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating infections and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Polygala hasskarlii include isoflavones, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala hasskarlii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, as well as being made into pills or tinctures, to treat a variety of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and respiratory infections.
